
# Pull Request

## Summary

Provide a one-line summary of the change and the motivation.

- What: (e.g. moved `sort` button into `libs/buttons/sort.py`)
- Why: (brief motivation)

---

## Checklist (leave unchecked if not applicable)

- [ ] Tests added?.
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`pytest`)?
- [ ] I updated relevant docs or README where behavior changed?
- [ ] I verified the change in the running app (if applicable).

---

## Risks and backward-compatibility

Note any breaking changes, migrations required, or areas that need special
attention during review or after deploy.

---
